details.test: Task 1: Latest Sunday exam-period branch added to favorites and reopened
Task 2: Set personal borrowing goal from undergraduate general books limit
Task 3: Choose compatible study area and set as primary study spot
Task 4: Book 2-hour group study room at Main Library next Wednesday
Task 5: Submit interlibrary loan request for a specific book chapter
Task 6: Filter equipment by fine and add lowest-fine item to low-risk list
Task 7: Register for online citation management workshop (4pm+ next 7 days)
Task 8: Save three psychology databases and assign them to PSYC 101 folder
Task 9: Submit accessibility request about extended e-book loan periods
